title: Fixed ignition config creation (propagation of proxy settings)
body:
In the v4.5.1 release, the propagation of proxy settings for QEMU VMs was broken.

The issue #13168 that was solved in the PR #13209 has come back.
@amilanoski mentioned the issue [there](https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/13209#issuecomment-1567440474)

I could repeat the issue on my side as well, and the researching led me to the next:
* the issue was not until v4.5.1 release
* as far as I can tell, the issue is caused by some of the changes within the PR #18167, if be more precisely this [0dac214](https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/0dac214f56b40db6104d20ddfe89ff345934899a#diff-2c925d6ff6f9b6848d4c49e021e3ca1cc2641d631b871f1a59279a70fc4314deR223-R233)

The cause was in a broken sequence of Ignition config creation, such that, the part, responsible for propagation of proxy settings, was not included in the final ignConfig

This PR contains a fix of Ignition config creation

The PR also contains a minor adjustment of Makefile for Darwin (macOS).

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

None

```release-note
Fixed Ignition config creation (is relavant only for qemu VMs)
```
